description: Add category assignment feature to TUI with [c] keyboard shortcut. Currently projects can have a category field set in config, but there's no TUI interface to assign/change categories. Implement a flow where pressing 'c' when a project is selected shows a text input to enter a category name. If the category doesn't exist in config.Categories, add it automatically using config.AddCategory(). After input, call project.SetCategory() and config.SaveConfig() to persist. Show error messages if save fails.
note: Successfully implemented category assignment feature with [c] keyboard shortcut. Added category input mode, updated help text, and integrated with config.AddCategory() and project.SetCategory() as specified.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing 'c' on a selected project enters category input mode (only works when project is selected, not on worktrees or categories)
Text input prompts for category name with placeholder like 'Enter category name'
After entering category name and pressing Enter, the category is saved to the project
If the category doesn't exist in config.Categories list, it is automatically added
Config is saved successfully and TUI returns to normal navigation mode
Help text shows '[c] assign category' when a project is selected
Help text does NOT show '[c]' shortcut for worktrees or categories

verification.value: Manually test: run wt, select a project, press 'c', enter a category name, verify config file is updated with both project.category and categories list if new
